docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-26-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF COURTNEY BUTLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAUREN KOUMELIS IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES SALAM THOMAS AND AMBER SOBOLEWSKI. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST OF CONTINUANCE DUE TO FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL WAS REJECTED BY CLERK'S OFFICE ON 7-13-23 SO PLAINTIFF IS NOT READY FOR TRIAL. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES, ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY BUTLER, COURTNEY KOUMELIS, LAUREN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTLER, COURTNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOUMELIS, LAUREN $255.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $305.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF COURTNEY BUTLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAUREN KOUMELIS IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES SALAM THOMAS AND AMBER SOBOLEWSKI. DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY WAIVES SERVICE ON 7-19-23. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,355.07 FILED BY BUTLER, COURTNEY AS TO DEFENDANT KOUMELIS, LAUREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
